title: Ignored FILTER EXIST with multiple OPTIONAL
description:
On the http://dbpedia.org/sparql endpoint (Virtuoso 7.20), the following query ignores the FILTER NOT EXISTS constraint (8,694 actual matches vs 3,569 expected).
 prefix dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>

 select ?a ?i where {

     ?a a dbo:Automobile .

     filter not exists { ?a dbo:manufacturer ?m }

     optional { ?a <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/thumbnail> ?i } # matching
     optional { ?a <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/depiction> ?i } # matching
     optional { ?a <http://schema.org/image> ?i } # non-matching
     optional { ?a <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/logo> ?i } # non-matching

 }

The query fails if both matching and non-matching OPTIONAL clauses are present, with the same overall pattern described in #392, i.e. it works only if either:

all patterns match (only optionals 1/2)
no pattern matches (only optionals 3/4)
at most on pattern matches and one pattern doesn't match (e.g. only optionals 2/3)

Possibly related also to #391.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE automobiles (id INT PRIMARY KEY, manufacturer VARCHAR(255), thumbnail VARCHAR(255), depiction VARCHAR(255), image VARCHAR(255), logo VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO automobiles (id, manufacturer, thumbnail, depiction, image, logo) VALUES (1, 'Toyota', 'toyota_thumbnail.jpg', 'toyota_depiction.jpg', NULL, NULL);
INSERT INTO automobiles (id, manufacturer, thumbnail, depiction, image, logo) VALUES (2, NULL, 'honda_thumbnail.jpg', 'honda_depiction.jpg', NULL, NULL);
SELECT id, thumbnail FROM automobiles WHERE manufacturer IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM automobiles WHERE manufacturer IS NOT NULL) LIMIT 10;
SELECT id, COALESCE(thumbnail, depiction, image, logo) AS image_url FROM automobiles WHERE manufacturer IS NULL;
key_bug_features: FILTER NOT EXISTS with multiple OPTIONAL clauses
